name: complete
description:
Signal that your delegated task is finished.

Call this tool when you have completed the work assigned to you. Provide a summary of what was accomplished.

This tool is only available during delegation (child contexts). It explicitly signals completion to the parent context.

Issue #10 (v2.1.4): set `coverage_gap=true` if your answer is incomplete because the work requires sources you cannot access (e.g. a researcher consulted only the docs DB but the answer also requires source-file inspection). When set, the engine SUPPRESSES auto-relay for this completion and instead injects a `[COVERAGE GAP]` message into the lead context so lead can chain to a follow-up specialist (e.g. a reader). YOU MUST also describe the gap concretely in `gap_description` (what's missing and why) so the lead knows what to investigate. List the file paths the lead should inspect in `suggested_files`.

summary.description: Summary of what was accomplished during this delegation

coverage_gap.description: Set true if your answer is incomplete due to missing source access. Suppresses auto-relay and returns control to the lead. Requires gap_description when true. (#10, v2.1.4)

gap_description.description: Concrete description of what your answer DOES NOT cover and why — the part that the next specialist needs to fill in. Required when coverage_gap=true. (#10, v2.1.4)

suggested_files.description: File paths the lead should inspect to fill the gap. Only meaningful when coverage_gap=true. (#10, v2.1.4)
